violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. A bucket of ice for drinks was stored right next to the hand sink.--Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. A box of potatoes was stored on the floor in the walk in cooler. Boxes and bags of chicken were stored on the floor in the walk in freezer. Boxes of stuffing and refried beans were stored on the floor in the basement.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Laminate for the edge of the counter by the stove is missing, with exposed wood. No longer a cleanable surface.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. The hood system and filters need to be cleaned.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in the proper location to protect from contamination. The ice scoop for drinks was stored directly under the paper towels for the hand sink.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Open boxes portion cups, foam hinged containers, and cups were stored on the floor in the basement storage area.

Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door. The spring for the door to the employee bathroom has been removed. No longer a self closing door. This spring needs to be in place.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The floor in the walk in cooler needs to be cleaned and removed of ice build up.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Missing/broken floor tile by the dishwasher, fryers, back door, and white reach in freezer.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. A box of tater rounds was stored on the floor in the back of the walk in freezer. A box of potatoes was stored on the floor in the walk in cooler. A bag of flour was stored on the floor of the first landing going down the stairs.

Preventing contamination by consumers. — --Consumer self-service sign was not posted where needed or as required. A sign instructing the consumer to obtain a clean plate for each trip was not posted on the salad bar

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. The laminate for the white counter by the stove is missing, with exposed wood. This is not a cleanable surface.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors under the cooking equipment need to be cleaned.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Broken and missing floor tile in the dishwasher area. Broken floor tile by the back door of the kitchen.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
